title: Workspace package reliability scrub execution
summary: Manager led execution strategy for auditing all Pi Loom packages and landing validated reliability, robustness, and cohesion fixes.
purpose: Turn the broad package scrub into durable, reviewable execution slices so package-cluster work can proceed in parallel without losing layer context.
contextAndOrientation: The workspace began with green diagnostics and tests plus a recently completed hygiene remediation plan. This scrub focused on latent correctness, robustness, and cohesion issues across all ten shipped packages.
planOfWork: Split the scrub into foundation, execution, and review/orchestration clusters under manager supervision; inspect each package in its cluster; land targeted fixes with regression coverage; then run workspace verification.
concreteSteps: Created initiative/research/plan/tickets/workers, launched package-level scrub tasks, applied ten package fixes, addressed post-merge lint/typecheck fallout, and re-ran workspace verification.
validation: Targeted package tests landed for each fix, then `npm run check && npm test` passed from the repo root.
risksAndQuestions: Remaining question: whether any unaudited package surfaces outside the inspected file set still need path/canonicalization hardening.
outcomesAndRetrospective: The scrub found ten concrete latent issues across all ten packages. Worker records, tickets, research, and plan state now reflect a completed manager-led remediation pass with successful workspace verification.

discoveries.note: Every package task found at least one concrete latent issue despite a fully green baseline.
discoveries.evidence: The manager-led scrub landed ten fixes across constitution, research, initiatives, specs, plans, ticketing, workers, critique, Ralph, and docs after `lsp diagnostics` and baseline `npm test` were already green.

decisions.decision: Use package-scoped scrub tasks under three durable worker clusters instead of one monolithic audit pass.
decisions.rationale: The package files were independent enough to review and patch in parallel while still rolling up to manager-supervised cluster tickets and worker records.
decisions.author: assistant

packetSummary: initiative:workspace-package-reliability-scrub; 4 linked ticket(s); 1 roadmap; 1 initiative; 2 research; 0 spec; 4 ticket; 0 critique; 0 doc
